seoTitle: Kangaroo Point vs Kangaroo Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kangaroo Point and Kangaroo Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kangaroo Point vs Kangaroo Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kangaroo Point and Kangaroo Valley.
heading: Kangaroo Point vs Kangaroo Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Point, New South Wales and Kangaroo Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kangaroo Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kangaroo Point (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Point or Kangaroo Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Point has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Kangaroo Valley scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Point scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Valley scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Point or Kangaroo Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kangaroo Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
